system.description: Ignore the injury and Initiative modifiers of one box of damage per point; also shifts torture/pain target numbers. Does not heal actual damage. SR2E p.126.
system.notes: SR2E p.126. Each point ignores wound penalties from that many damage boxes. Adds pts to TN to inflict pain on adept; subtracts from TN to resist pain. Does not help Damage Resistance Tests. Cost: 0.25/pt.
